metadata.description: Cowork marketplace test: persistence, binaries, and MCPB extensions

plugins.description: Claude-style mirror for the bootstrap strategy

plugins.name: sa-cowork-download-probe
plugins.description: Claude-style mirror for the download strategy

plugins.name: sa-cowork-remote-config-probe
plugins.description: Rootly-style hosted MCP probe for testing userConfig in remote connectors, hooks, and skills
